strategy: Rewrite/squash all history into one active baseline
rationale: Strong bootstrap but accidental production replay and loss of historical context require strict history reconciliation

rationale: Keeps baseline invisible to production, preserves two truthful ledger rows, and gives CI a deterministic baseline-plus-forward replay
